description: Collier Renovate config. See package.json#overrides for dependency pins that depend on transitive compat (currently: undici is pinned to ^7.28.0 because jsdom@29.x requires undici v7's internal API).

packageRules.description: undici is pinned via package.json#overrides to ^7.28.0; jsdom@29.1.1 (the latest published version) requires the removed internal module undici/lib/handler/wrap-handler.js from undici v7. Drop this rule when jsdom releases a version that supports undici v8+.
